positive: A stylized celestial animal, a radiant owl perched upon a crescent moon, with glowing ethereal feathers and sharp, geometric details. The owl has large, expressive eyes and a mystical presence. Surround the owl and moon with stylized constellations, swirling nebula smoke, and delicate cosmic flora. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, iridescent gold, and cosmic lavender. The style must be high-contrast, clean line art mixed with glowing watercolor texture, perfectly designed for a central circular print application on dark apparel. Vector art elements mixed with painterly detail. Minimalist yet richly detailed composition. Golden ratio composition. Highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, deep shadows, blur, grainy, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, messy, complex background, cartoonish, muted colors
